goal: Codify a mandatory conflict arbitration mechanism in repository entry docs so all AI collaborators follow one dispute-resolution workflow.
constraints: Do not change gameplay logic or runtime behavior.
Only edit workflow/policy documentation and this task file.
Conflict handling must require writing a conflict record before implementation.
If key requirement is unclear, ask user for clarification before editing code/content.
deliverables: Updated AGENTS.md with mandatory conflict arbitration rule.
Updated AI_START_HERE.md with quick-start conflict arbitration checkpoint.
Updated docs/AI-mainline-policy.md with conflict arbitration execution rule.
New docs template that includes conflict record table, arbitration command template, and decision matrix.
